name: GIGABYTE Z790 AORUS ELITE X WIFI7 1.0 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 4x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8266(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.0 - DisplayPort 1.2 - 2.5 GbE LAN - Wi-Fi 7 (Z790 A ELITE X WIFI7)
shortName: GIGABYTE Z790 AORUS ELITE X WIFI7 1.0 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA
description: ATX Z790 flagship motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with WiFi 7 and premium DDR5 support.
